name: Death Benefits for Chemical Exposure in Holladay Utah

mainEntity.name: Can family members claim benefits if I die from chemical exposure in Holladay?
mainEntity.text: Can family members claim benefits if I die from chemical exposure in Holladay?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Utah death benefits to spouse (66 2/3% wages x 8 yrs max) and dependents if work exposure caused death.

suggestedAnswer.text: File within 1 year of death. Prove nexus via autopsy/tox reports. Holladay payouts up to $300k+. Insurers challenge dependency—docs prove. Survivors get burial ($10k) and ongoing support.

description: Yes, Utah death benefits to spouse (66 2/3% wages x 8 yrs max) and dependents if work exposure caused death.
